title: Neznámý titulek
content: ADCC 2026 will take place in the TAURON Arena in Krakow, Poland on September 12th and 13th, 2026 and this is the full updated list of every competitor invited. There are only two ways to earn an invite to ADCC, either winning an ADCC Trials tournament or by being awarded a place based on past performances. There are 8 invites available for men at Trials and 4 for the women, as their divisions are half the size. It’s also customary for the top four athletes in every weight class from the previous edition to receive invites, although this is not guaranteed. Below is a list of all the results from this cycle of ADCC Trials: First ADCC European, Middle-Eastern, and African Trials Results Second ADCC European, Middle-Eastern, and African Trials Results First ADCC North American Trials Results Second ADCC North American Trials Results First ADCC South American Trials Results Second ADCC South American Trials Results First ADCC Asia and Oceania Trials Results Second ADCC Asia and Oceania Trials Results For anyone interested in taking a look back at ADCC 2024 to see how some of the names in the 2026 competitor list managed to do the last time that the tournament took place, the full results can be found here: ADCC 2024 Weight Classes Results and Play-by-play ADCC 2024 Absolute Divisions Results and Play-by-play ADCC 2024 Superfights Results and Play-by-play ADCC 2026 Updated Competitor List Superfights There is always at least one superfight at ADCC, and the Superfight title is currently held by Gordon Ryan. Historically, the man challenging for the title is the absolute champion from the previous edition. That man is Kaynan Duarte and although he did have a face-off with Ryan at ADCC 2024, that match is not yet confirmed. There is also the possibility for the first ever women’s superfight title-fight, as Adele Fornarino won the absolute division at ADCC 2024. This has not yet been confirmed either, and there’s no indication as to who might face her if the title is created. Men’s Divisions Under 66kg Diogo Reis – Invited (champion) Fabricio Andrey – Invited Niko Mikuliszyn – Trials winner Dorian Olivarez – Trials winner Ryoma Anraku – Trials winner Yigit Hanay – Trials winner David Santos – Trials winner Kaua Gabriel – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? Under 77kg Mica Galvao – Invited (Champion) Mateusz Gamrot – Invited Magomed Dzharbaev – Trials winner Jacob Bornemann – Trials winner Izaak Michell – Trials winner (potentially replaced due to ongoing legal issues) Nikolay Vetrov – Trials winner Julio Martins – Trials winner Alexandre De Jesus – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? Under 88kg Giancarlo Bodoni – Invited (Champion) Pawel Jaworski – Trials winner Jon ‘Thor’ Blank – Trials winner Jozef Chen – Trials winner Marlon Tajik – Trials winner Franco Diaz – Trials winner Gustavo Batista – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? Under 99kg Kaynan Duarte – Invited (Champion) Adam Wardzinski – Invited Declan Moody – Trials winner Achilles Rocha – Trials winner Nicholas Maglicic – Trials winner Eoghan O’Flanagan – Trials winner Elioenai Braz – Trials winner Vinicius Lessa – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? Over 99kg Felipe Pena – Invited (Champion) Mark Macqueen – Trials winner Brandon Reed – Trials winner Tito Carle – Trials winner Haisam Rida – Trials winner Roosevelt Sousa – Trials winner Pedro Lucas – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? Women’s Divisions Under 55kg Adele Fornarino – Invited (Champion) Janette Gloger – Trials winner Mayssa Bastos – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? Under 65kg Ana Vieira – Invited (Champion) Injana Goodman – Trials winner Livia Barasine – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? ??? Over 65kg Rafaela Guedes – Invited (Champion) Gabi Garcia – Invited Anabel Lopez – Trials winner Yara Soares – Trials winner ??? ??? ??? ??? The full ADCC 2026 event, including every athlete invited in the above competitor list, will be available to watch live on September 12th and 13th, 2026 on FloGrappling, click here to subscribe and watch.
